overview: Abadan Anti-Aging Clinic provides longevity medicine and IV therapy treatments to improve quality of life and promote natural anti-aging results. Led by Family Nurse Practitioner Shirin Nazarian, APRN, FNP-C.
highlights: Specialty IV therapy for immune support and healing
Herbal healing and medical ozone therapy
targetAudience: Adults in the Sparks, Nevada area seeking anti-aging treatments, hormonal balance, and longevity medicine.
